title: ochna calophylla
intro: Ochna calophylla, also known as the Kurrajong, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Ochna calophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
